content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 8, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on April 8, 2026, focused on expanding the ecosystem's cross-chain capabilities and advancing community discussions regarding multi-agent coordination and identity verification.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Cross-Chain Integration**
    *   Initiated the addition of a new plugin to facilitate cross-chain swaps across 10+ chains via [#336](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/336).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#336](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/336): feat: add @mangoswap/elizaos-plugin — enables cross-chain swaps for 10+ chains.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6514](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6514) Inter-Agent Coordination**
    *   The discussion continues to evolve around establishing persistent peer relationships and behavioral history for AI agents.
    *   Latest contributions suggest using WTRMRK for append-only on-chain attestation sequences on Base L2 to verify an agent's sustained operational history, depth, and recency.
    *   Participants emphasize that combining wallet-based credentials (to verify current holdings) with behavioral sequences (to verify long-term reliability) provides a robust solution to the "cold-start" problem for cross-instance trust and identity.
